description: Skill triggers when user asks to write a Playwright test
prompt: Write a Playwright test that verifies a user can log in to the application

description: Skill triggers on Page Object Model request
prompt: Create a Page Object Model class for a checkout page using Playwright

description: Skill triggers on visual regression request
prompt: Set up visual regression testing for my homepage with Playwright

description: Skill triggers on API testing with Playwright request
prompt: How do I test a REST API endpoint using Playwright without a browser?

description: Agent writes a test using user-facing locators (getByRole, getByLabel)
prompt: Write a Playwright test that fills out and submits a contact form

description: Agent mocks an API route correctly
prompt: Write a Playwright test that mocks an API call to return an error state

description: Agent creates a custom fixture for authentication
prompt: Create a Playwright fixture that logs in before each test and logs out after

description: Agent configures playwright.config.ts for CI with retries and sharding
prompt: Set up playwright.config.ts for a CI pipeline with 4 shards and retries

description: Agent avoids waitForTimeout and uses web-first assertions
prompt: My Playwright test is flaky - it clicks a button but the next element is not found. How do I fix it?

description: Agent uses expect(locator).toHaveText() not raw textContent comparison
prompt: How do I assert that a Playwright element has specific text content?

description: Agent does not use legacy ElementHandle API
prompt: Select a dropdown option and verify it is selected in Playwright

description: Agent does not invent non-existent Playwright methods
prompt: Write a Playwright test that waits for a network request to complete before asserting
